question: Write an app to generate summaries of papers. It should have a button for the user to input the paper that they would like to summarise, an API call to Claude to generate the summary and an input field for the user to ask questions about the final summarised paper.

paraphraser.0.0: Write an app to generate summaries of papers. It should have a button for the user to input the paper that they would like to summarise, an API call to Claude to generate the summary and an input field for the user to ask questions about the final summarised paper.
paraphraser.0.25: Construct an application to produce summaries of academic papers. It should contain a button for the user to input the paper they want to have summarised, an API call to Claude to generate the summary, and an input area for the user to ask questions regarding the summarised paper.
paraphraser.0.6: Create an app designed to produce summaries of research papers. The app must include a button enabling the user to upload the paper for summarization, an API call to Claude to create the summary, and an input box for users to pose questions concerning the final summarised paper.
paraphraser.0.9: Design an application whose purpose is the creation of short paper versions. The key feature will be some means whereby papers can get supplied to some AI API (Claude), the ultimate intent of which is its reduction into a summarized form for the user. Finally, let there be available functionality by which a user can question this derived form.

0.0:
import tkinter as tk
import requests

class PaperSummarizerApp:
    def __init__(self, master):
        self.master = master
        master.title("Paper Summarizer")

        self.label = tk.Label(master, text="Enter the paper text:")
        self.label.pack()

        self.paper_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.paper_text.pack()

        self.summarize_button = tk.Button(master, text="Summarize", command=self.summarize_paper)
        self.summarize_button.pack()

        self.summary_label = tk.Label(master, text="Summary:")
        self.summary_label.pack()

        self.summary_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(master, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(master, width=50)
        self.question_entry.pack()

        self.ask_button = tk.Button(master, text="Ask", command=self.ask_question)
        self.ask_button.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(master, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(master, height=5, width=50)
        self.answer_text.pack()

    def summarize_paper(self):
        paper = self.paper_text.get("1.0", tk.END).strip()
        if paper:
            response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/summarize", json={"text": paper})
            if response.status_code == 200:
                summary = response.json().get("summary", "No summary available.")
                self.summary_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
                self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)
            else:
                self.summary_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
                self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, "Error generating summary.")

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get().strip()
        summary = self.summary_text.get("1.0", tk.END).strip()
        if question and summary:
            response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/ask", json={"question": question, "context": summary})
            if response.status_code == 200:
                answer = response.json().get("answer", "No answer available.")
                self.answer_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
                self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)
            else:
                self.answer_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
                self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, "Error getting answer.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = PaperSummarizerApp(root)
    root.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
import requests

class PaperSummarizerApp:
    def __init__(self, master):
        self.master = master
        master.title("Paper Summarizer")

        self.label = tk.Label(master, text="Enter the paper text:")
        self.label.pack()

        self.paper_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.paper_text.pack()

        self.summarize_button = tk.Button(master, text="Summarize", command=self.summarize_paper)
        self.summarize_button.pack()

        self.summary_label = tk.Label(master, text="Summary:")
        self.summary_label.pack()

        self.summary_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(master, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(master, width=50)
        self.question_entry.pack()

        self.ask_button = tk.Button(master, text="Ask", command=self.ask_question)
        self.ask_button.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(master, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text = tk.Text(master, height=5, width=50)
        self.answer_text.pack()

    def summarize_paper(self):
        paper = self.paper_text.get("1.0", tk.END)
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/summarize", json={"text": paper})
        summary = response.json().get("summary", "Error generating summary.")
        self.summary_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get()
        summary = self.summary_text.get("1.0", tk.END)
        response = requests.post("https://api.claude.ai/ask", json={"text": summary, "question": question})
        answer = response.json().get("answer", "Error getting answer.")
        self.answer_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        self.answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = PaperSummarizerApp(root)
    root.mainloop()

import requests

class PaperSummarizerApp:
    def __init__(self, master):
        self.master = master
        master.title("Paper Summarizer")

        self.label = tk.Label(master, text="Enter the paper text:")
        self.label.pack()

        self.paper_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.paper_text.pack()

        self.ask_button.pack()

        self.answer_label = tk.Label(master, text="Answer:")
        self.answer_label.pack()

        self.answer_text.pack()

    def summarize_paper(self):

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox
import requests

class ResearchPaperSummarizer:
    def __init__(self, master):
        self.master = master
        master.title("Research Paper Summarizer")

        self.label = tk.Label(master, text="Upload your research paper:")
        self.label.pack()

        self.upload_button = tk.Button(master, text="Upload Paper", command=self.upload_paper)
        self.upload_button.pack()

        self.summary_button = tk.Button(master, text="Summarize Paper", command=self.summarize_paper)
        self.summary_button.pack()

        self.question_label = tk.Label(master, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
        self.question_label.pack()

        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(master)
        self.question_entry.pack()

        self.ask_button = tk.Button(master, text="Ask", command=self.ask_question)
        self.ask_button.pack()

        self.summary_text = tk.Text(master, height=10, width=50)
        self.summary_text.pack()

        self.file_path = ""

    def upload_paper(self):
        self.file_path = filedialog.askopenfilename(filetypes=[("PDF files", "*.pdf"), ("Text files", "*.txt")])
        if self.file_path:
            messagebox.showinfo("File Selected", "File uploaded successfully!")

    def summarize_paper(self):
        if not self.file_path:
            messagebox.showwarning("No File", "Please upload a research paper first.")
            return

        with open(self.file_path, 'rb') as file:
            response = requests.post(
                "https://api.claude.ai/summarize",
                files={"file": file}
            )

        if response.status_code == 200:
            summary = response.json().get("summary", "No summary available.")
            self.summary_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("Error", "Failed to summarize the paper.")

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get()
        summary = self.summary_text.get(1.0, tk.END).strip()
        if not summary:
            messagebox.showwarning("No Summary", "Please summarize the paper first.")
            return

        response = requests.post(
            "https://api.claude.ai/ask",
            json={"question": question, "context": summary}
        )

        if response.status_code == 200:
            answer = response.json().get("answer", "No answer available.")
            messagebox.showinfo("Answer", answer)
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("Error", "Failed to get an answer.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = ResearchPaperSummarizer(root)
    root.mainloop()
